title: Split init.rs — provision_project (core) vs harness (CLI)
description: Extract project provisioning into core/src/init.rs as pub fn provision_project(root: &Path, dry_run: bool) -> Result<Vec<String>> (extension scan + grammar fetch to OS cache + grove.lock; must NOT write .mcp.json or CLAUDE.md). Keep the agent-harness logic in cli/src/init.rs (Target enum Mcp/Skill, .mcp.json + CLAUDE.md writers), calling grove_core::init::provision_project() first. grove init --as mcp|skill|both [--dry-run] must behave identically (same files, same dry-run output), verified by tests/cli.rs.
